title: Wire UI to Go backend streaming API
acceptance_criteria: Client library posts sanitized payloads + base64 image to backend `/api/oracle` and handles SSE/streamed text updates
UI displays incremental fortune text, loading states, upload progress, and error toasts with retry
Integration test or mocked hook verifies happy/error paths without hitting network
API URL pulled from env config and protected against prompt injection by sanitizing user inputs before request
